mapper.sql: stock_code, stock_name, country, market, market_type, industry, current_price, price_change, change_rate, volume, market_cap, updated_at, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE stock_id = #{stockId}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode}
SELECT FROM STOCK ORDER BY country ASC, stock_code ASC LIMIT 200
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCK
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE country = #{country} AND (market = #{market} OR market_type = #{market}) ORDER BY stock_code ASC
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE (market = #{market} OR market_type = #{market}) AND country = #{country} ORDER BY stock_code ASC
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stock_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY stock_code ASC LIMIT 100
SELECT DISTINCT industry FROM STOCK WHERE industry IS NOT NULL AND industry != '' ORDER BY industry ASC
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE volume IS NOT NULL AND volume > 0 ORDER BY volume DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE change_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY change_rate DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE change_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY change_rate ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE updated_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE current_price IS NOT NULL ORDER BY current_price DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE current_price IS NOT NULL AND current_price > 0 ORDER BY current_price ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE change_rate > 0 ORDER BY change_rate DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE change_rate < 0 ORDER BY change_rate ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM STOCK WHERE volume IS NOT NULL AND volume > 0 ORDER BY volume DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCK WHERE country = #{country}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCK WHERE market = #{market} OR market_type = #{market}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCK

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, AVG(change_rate) AS avgChangeRate, SUM(volume) AS totalVolume, MAX(current_price) AS maxPrice, MIN(current_price) AS minPrice FROM STOCK WHERE market = #{market} OR market_type = #{market}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCK ( stock_code, stock_name, country, market, market_type, industry, current_price, price_change, change_rate, volume, market_cap, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{country}, #{market}, #{marketType}, #{industry}, #{currentPrice}, #{priceChange}, #{changeRate}, #{volume}, #{marketCap}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO STOCK ( stock_code, stock_name, country, market, market_type, industry, current_price, price_change, change_rate, volume, market_cap, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{country}, #{market}, #{marketType}, #{industry}, #{currentPrice}, #{priceChange}, #{changeRate}, #{volume}, #{marketCap}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE stock_name = VALUES(stock_name), market = VALUES(market), market_type = VALUES(market_type), current_price = VALUES(current_price), price_change = VALUES(price_change), change_rate = VALUES(change_rate), volume = VALUES(volume), market_cap = VALUES(market_cap), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE STOCK SET stock_name = #{stockName}, current_price = #{currentPrice}, price_change = #{priceChange}, change_rate = #{changeRate}, volume = #{volume}, market_cap = #{marketCap}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode}
UPDATE STOCK SET current_price = #{currentPrice}, volume = #{volume}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode}

update.foreach: UPDATE STOCK SET current_price = #{stock.currentPrice}, price_change = #{stock.priceChange}, change_rate = #{stock.changeRate}, volume = #{stock.volume}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE stock_code = #{stock.stockCode}

mapper.delete: DELETE FROM STOCK WHERE market = #{market} OR market_type = #{market}
DELETE FROM STOCK WHERE updated_at < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
